---
title: "Statistical Analysis & Predictive Modelling of Women's T20 International Cricket"
output: html_document
---

# Statistical Analysis & Predictive Modelling of Women's T20 International Cricket
Women's T20 International cricket presents a compelling and underexplored domain for statistical modelling. Unlike men's cricket, which has benefited from decades of academic analysis and established predictive frameworks, WT20I remains statistically sparse—characterised by limited match histories per player and team, constrained training data, and fundamental differences in match dynamics (pace of play, risk tolerance, skill distributions).



Make sure the code in the block below is run before any of the other cells in the document. Make sure that wt20_ball_by_ball.csv is in the directory (this can be created by running parse_wt20.py)
```{r Summary of our Data set}
source("Model_discovery.R")
```
<!-- R Notebook saved outputs: do not edit
RNOTEBOOK_RMD_STATE_BEGIN
eyJ2ZXJzaW9uIjoyLCJjb2RlQ2VsbFN0YXRlcyI6W3siZmluZ2VycHJpbnQiOiJ7XCJsYW5ndWFnZVwiOlwiclwiLFwiY29kZVwi
Olwic291cmNlKFxcXCJNb2RlbF9kaXNjb3ZhcnkuUlxcXCIpXCIsXCJvcHRpb25zXCI6e1wibGFiZWxcIjpcIlN1bW1hcnkgb2Yg
b3VyIERhdGEgc2V0XCJ9fSIsInJlc3VsdCI6eyJ0eXBlIjoicmVzdWx0IiwiY2h1bmtfaWQiOiJuYi0yIiwic291cmNlX2NvZGUi
OiJzb3VyY2UoXCJNb2RlbF9kaXNjb3ZhcnkuUlwiKVxuIiwiY29uc29sZV9zZWdtZW50cyI6W10sImNvbnNvbGUiOiIiLCJzdGRv
dXQiOiIiLCJzdGRlcnIiOiIiLCJwbG90cyI6W10sInBsb3RzX2h0bWwiOltdLCJkYXRhZnJhbWVzIjpbXSwib3V0cHV0X29yZGVy
IjpbXSwiZXJyb3IiOiJ3cml0ZSBFUElQRSJ9fV0sImNvZGVDZWxsUmVzdWx0cyI6W119
RNOTEBOOK_RMD_STATE_END
-->
